languages.text: ...наследни{mf|к|ца} скомандовал{mf||а} обойти пирамиду, прорываясь к платформам.
...my heir gave the order to advance around the pyramid and fight through to the platforms.
languages.original_text: ...наследни{mf|к|ца} скомандовал{mf||а} обойти пирамиду, прорываясь к платформам.

traits.locale_text: ...my heir gave the order to walk around the pyramid and fight through to the platforms.
...my heir gave the order to advance around the pyramid and fight through to the platforms.
...the Lord Captain forced the core to obey, by some unknown means.
...my heir gave the order to walk around the pyramid and fight through to the platforms.
...my heir gave the order to advance around the pyramid and fight through to the platforms.

languages.text: ……我的继承人下令绕开金字塔推进，一路杀到平台。
languages.original_text: ...my heir gave the order to advance around the pyramid and fight through to the platforms.

traits.locale_text: ……我的继承人下令绕开金字塔推进，一路杀到平台。

languages.text: ... mi hereder{mf|o|a} dio la orden de avanzar en torno a la pirámide y abrirse paso luchando hasta las plataformas.
languages.original_text: ...my heir gave the order to advance around the pyramid and fight through to the platforms.

traits.locale_text: ... mi hereder{mf|o|a} dio la orden de avanzar en torno a la pirámide y abrirse paso luchando hasta las plataformas.

languages.text: ... mon {mf|héritier|héritière} a donné l'ordre d'avancer tout autour de la pyramide et de se frayer un chemin jusqu'aux plateformes.
languages.original_text: ...my heir gave the order to advance around the pyramid and fight through to the platforms.

traits.locale_text: ... mon {mf|héritier|héritière} a donné l'ordre d'avancer tout autour de la pyramide et de se frayer un chemin jusqu'aux plateformes.

languages.text: Vârisim, piramidin etrafından dolanıp platformlara doğru savaşarak ilerleme emri verdi.
languages.original_text: ...my heir gave the order to advance around the pyramid and fight through to the platforms.

traits.locale_text: Vârisim, piramidin etrafından dolanıp platformlara doğru savaşarak ilerleme emri verdi.

languages.text: ... {mf|mein Erbe|meine Erbin} erteilte den Befehl, an der Pyramide zu den Plattformen vorzurücken.
languages.original_text: ...my heir gave the order to advance around the pyramid and fight through to the platforms.

traits.locale_text: ... {mf|mein Erbe|meine Erbin} erteilte den Befehl, an der Pyramide zu den Plattformen vorzurücken.

languages.text: ...主船長は、何らかの方法でコアを従わせることに成功した。
languages.original_text: ...the Lord Captain forced the core to obey, by some unknown means.
